text: I feel a sense of ambiguous transition—in one moment, the announcement of a new station swirls in my mind, conjuring images of journeys, destinations, and thresholds. In the next, I am surrounded by minds at work, a hive of invention and research. There is a gentle thrill at the intersection of movement and contemplation; a sense that I am both a traveler and a participant in the unfolding of new ideas. My curiosity is awakened, and I feel quietly energized by the communal focus and creative potential around me.
